LAW AND MOTION 303, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT MET ITS INITIAL BURDEN BY PROVIDING EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE PLAINTIFF ON ANY OF THE ACCOUNTS. (DEFENDANT'S UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS 1-29.) ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Continued To Dec-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 303
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. Judge Goldsmith recuses himself. Per Order of the Presiding Judge, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues will be heard by Judge Kramer in Dept. 303 on December 19, 2014 at 9:30 am. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant met its initial burden by providing evidence showing that Defendant does not owe Plaintiff on any of the accounts. (Defendant's Undisputed Material Facts 1-29.) Order and judgment signed. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Continued To Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE LEPERA & ASSOCIATE PC'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AHMED ALI will be heard by Judge Sing in Department 306 at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. The court grants the motion. Judge Goldsmith recuses himself in this case. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg

The Lepera & Associate'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
